title: ajuga iva var. cleistogama
intro: Ajuga iva var. cleistogama, also known as Ajuga cleistogama, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Ajuga iva plant, a species of flowering plant in the mint family. It is known for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, attributed to its bioactive compounds such as ajugol and ajuganone. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including the ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Ajuga iva var. cleistogama is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
